popIn: Hmm. You seem to be struggling.
...I wasn't going to say anything... but.
hint1Prefix: You get just one, maybe TWO hints...
hint2Prefix: Last one. And I mean it.
This is the final clue. Use it wisely.
noHintWarning: Okay. Now you won't get a hint!
insults: At this point I'm just entertained.
Every guess I lose a little more faith.
Have you tried guessing someone you've actually met?
Are you doing this on purpose?
This is like watching someone argue with a door.
You're in the archive. The answers are LITERALLY in the archive.
I've started taking notes. Maybe you should have too.
shakeResponses: Stop that! I have a SPINE, you know.
My pages are all out of order now!
clickIdle: I am a book. A very important book.
win: You did it! Quilliam is... pleased.
clickAfterWin: You got it! Leave me alone now.
The game is over. I'm off duty.
